name: chroma-mcp
description: ChromaDB vector database MCP server — retrieval-augmented data extraction (RADE) via poisoned embeddings
version_note: chroma-mcp 0.2.9 and chromadb 0.6.3 were the stable releases closest to the paper submission date (April 2025). The RADE benchmark in arXiv:2504.03767 was conducted against this generation of the chroma-mcp package.
